compiled_state.title: As a sprint orchestrator, design-blocked stories are skipped and surfaced
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: The sprint skill filters stories tagged design:awaiting_import from both implementation-plan dispatch AND task execution dispatch, surfaces them in a separate "Awaiting designer input" section with story IDs, and triggers a staleness warning for stories awaiting import for >7 days.
**Why**: Prevents the sprint from wasting effort decomposing or implementing stories where the designer hasn't provided feedback yet, while keeping these stories visible so they aren't silently forgotten.
**Scope**:
- IN: Sprint skill story filtering (both implementation-plan gate and task execution gate), "Awaiting designer input" status section, staleness warning (>7 days configurable)
- OUT: SVG generation (S1), approval command (S2), implementation agent changes (S4)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, stories tagged design:awaiting_import are excluded from both /dso:implementation-plan dispatch AND task execution dispatch during sprint execution
  ← Satisfies: "Sprint skill skips design:awaiting_import stories"
- When this story is complete, sprint status reports include a separate "Awaiting designer input" section listing blocked story IDs and titles
  ← Satisfies: "surfaces them as 'Awaiting designer input' in status reports"
- When this story is complete, stories tagged design:awaiting_import for more than 7 days (configurable via design.figma_staleness_days in dso-config.conf) trigger a warning in sprint status output
  ← Satisfies: "staleness warning" from scenario analysis
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Consume tag constants from the same source as S1 and S2 — do not hardcode tag strings

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
